headline: Why P&G, Maker of Bounty and Charmin, Hired a Forester
summary: The consumer goods giant has pledged to buy all of its wood pulp by 2030 from sources certified by the Forest Stewardship Council. This article was originally published on Trellis.net NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / June 16, 2026 / By Heather ...
